response.global_summary: A dynamic, animated music performance by virtual idols Hoshimachi Suisei and Mori Calliope. The performance is set in a crystalline, color-shifting environment and features two distinct songs, 'Mekimeki' and 'Dancing Reed', with high-energy choreography.

scenes.description: The video begins with Hoshimachi Suisei and Mori Calliope performing 'Mekimeki' in a crystal-filled environment. The on-screen text displays '未来島 -Future Island-'. The performance features synchronized dancing and rock elements.

レッツゴー 革命をここから

危険な海に浮かぶ島... 世界を変える未来島、LOVE IT！
[...歌詞はパフォーマンスに基づき続きます...]

Let's go, revolution from here
'Mekimeki', revolution from here
Dangerous seas, floating island... world-changing future island, love it!
[...Lyrics continue based on performance...]

scenes.description: A brief instrumental bridge during which Hoshimachi Suisei is shown enclosed within a glowing crystal. No vocals are present.
The performance continues with the song 'Dancing Reed', as indicated by the on-screen text. The idols, now with different costumes, perform in a new green-tinted crystalline setting.
